history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A split-screen game scoreboard interface shows two teams facing off with player rows, statistics, and a large green arrow pointing toward the lower-left area.

The main focus is a centered versus screen with a “VS” marker between two panels: the left panel labeled “HOWLERS” and the right panel labeled “WARBRINGERS,” each containing multiple rows of players with small square icons and columns for kills (K), deaths (D), and damage (DMG). A red circular crosshair-style reticle appears near the middle left of the “VS” area, and a large bright green arrow points upward from the lower-left portion of the interface.

Setting:
The background behind the overlay appears to be a first-person shooter game view outdoors in a daylight-like scene with a large building facade and road or platform elements visible through the transparent UI. The overall lighting looks like natural daylight, though much of the scene is tinted by the blue and orange overlay colors and UI transparency.

Visual Details:
The interface uses strong color separation: blue tones for “HOWLERS” on the left and orange tones for “WARBRINGERS” on the right, with dark header bars and semi-transparent rectangles for each player row. Each player row includes a small square avatar image, followed by a username and several numeric columns. At the bottom center, there are small HUD elements including a health/CPU-like percentage display and temperature text “39°C,” along with an FPS indicator “91.” Near the bottom left, a white rectangular button-like area contains text “SKILL” with an icon to the left of it. In the bottom right, there are two square icons/buttons with small symbols inside, and faint joystick-like silhouettes appear as part of the game overlay.

Visible Text:
HOWLERS
WARBRINGERS
VS
Pemain
K
D
DMG
SKILL
KETUK untuk tutup
CPU 54%
39°C
FPS 91
No other clearly readable player names or numbers are fully legible at this resolution.

Practical Summary:
The image is a game match screen showing team “HOWLERS” versus “WARBRINGERS” with player statistics listed for both sides. A green arrow highlights the lower-left UI area, while the underlying first-person scene remains visible through the transparent overlay.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
